office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy and oversee county departments, infrastructure, land use, and services.
race_blurb: Incumbent Clint Didier faces planning commissioner and business owner Joel Prantle.

candidates.summary: Didier is the incumbent commissioner and campaigns on lower taxes, fewer regulations, and limited government.
highlights: Opposes tax increases and supports lower taxes [S1]
Supports fewer regulations and limited government [S1]

taxes.basis: He explicitly opposes tax increases and supports lower taxes.

spending.basis: Limited government supplies a restraint direction without a detailed budget mechanism.

experience.basis: He is the incumbent commissioner with a county-governance record.

candidates.summary: Prantle is a business owner and appointed planning commissioner focused on responsible growth, constituent listening, and community values.
highlights: Serves on the county planning commission [S1]
Emphasizes responsible growth and servant leadership [S1]

experience.basis: Planning-commission service provides local institutional experience while he remains new to elected county office.
